ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the member's account */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the member */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the member (in kg) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the member (in cm) */,
  "density" REAL /* Body density of the member */,
  "body_fat" REAL /* Body fat percentage of the member */,
  "membership_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the membership plan the member is subscribed to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member's account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member (e.g. member, trainer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_membership_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_plan_id") REFERENCES membership_plans ("membership_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_plans" (
  "membership_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the membership plan (in USD) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the membership plan (e.g. month, year) */,
  "max_classes_per_week" INTEGER /* Maximum number of classes per week */,
  "max_personal_training_sessions" INTEGER /* Maximum number of personal training sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the trainer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the trainer (e.g. strength training, yoga) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trainer's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trainer's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the fitness class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fitness class */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer leading the class */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the class (days and times) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_classes_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member being measured */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "neck" REAL /* Neck circumference (in cm) */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest circumference (in cm) */,
  "abdomen" REAL /* Abdomen circumference (in cm) */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip circumference (in cm) */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh circumference (in cm) */,
  "knee" REAL /* Knee circumference (in cm) */,
  "ankle" REAL /* Ankle circumference (in cm) */,
  "biceps" REAL /* Biceps circumference (in cm) */,
  "forearm" REAL /* Forearm circumference (in cm) */,
  "wrist" REAL /* Wrist circumference (in cm) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the member (in kg) */,
  "body_fat" REAL /* Body fat percentage of the member */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member enrolling in the class */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the member enrolled in the class */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the member (e.g. attended, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_enrollments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES fitness_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_enrollments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member making the appointment */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer being appointed */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member sending the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member or trainer receiving the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_time" TEXT /* Time the message was sent */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member setting the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g. weight loss, muscle gain) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value of the goal (e.g. weight in kg) */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
